user.title: Connect to Volcast
user.description: Enter your Volcast API key. You can find it in the Volcast app under Settings > API Access.

production.title: Production Tracking (optional)
production.description:
Connect your inverter sensors to improve forecast accuracy. Volcast will send hourly production summaries for calibration.

Both are optional — you can configure them later in integration options.

data_description.pv_energy_entity: A sensor that shows today's total solar production in kWh (resets daily). This is the primary source for tracking — look for sensors like "Today's PV Generation" or "Daily Yield" from your inverter (GoodWe, Fronius, SolarEdge, Huawei, SMA, Enphase).
data_description.pv_power_entity: A sensor that shows current solar power output in watts. Used as a fallback when the energy sensor is unavailable or resets mid-day.
data_description.battery_soc_entity: A sensor that shows battery state of charge (0-100%). Used to detect inverter curtailment when the battery is full. Optional — only needed if you have a battery system.
data_description.battery_charge_power_entity: A sensor that shows battery charging power in watts. Used to confirm curtailment (battery full, not accepting charge) and detect grid charging (negative price scenarios). Optional.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Volcast API. Check your internet connection.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key or premium subscription required.

abort.already_configured: This API key is already configured.

data_description.pv_energy_entity: A sensor that shows today's total solar production in kWh (resets daily).
data_description.pv_power_entity: A sensor that shows current solar power output in watts. Used as fallback.
data_description.battery_soc_entity: A sensor that shows battery state of charge (0-100%). Used to detect curtailment.
data_description.battery_charge_power_entity: A sensor for battery charging power in watts. Detects curtailment and grid charging.

production_tracking_available.title: Improve forecast accuracy with production tracking
production_tracking_available.description: Volcast v1.5.0 can now track your actual PV production and use it to calibrate forecasts. Go to the integration options and select your inverter's energy or power sensor to enable this feature.
